innateAbility.name: Persecutor
innateAbility.description: The anti-arcanist applies a movement speed slow based on the affected enemy unit's current mana missing.

abilities.name: Mana Break
abilities.description: Burns an enemy's mana on each attack and deals damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Short distance teleportation that allows Anti-Mage to move in and out of combat.

abilities.name: Counterspell
abilities.description: Counterspell may be activated to create an anti-magic shell around Anti-Mage that blocks any offensive unit-targeted spells.

abilities.name: Mana Void
abilities.description: Deals damage within the radius, based on per point of missing mana of the unit-targeted enemy.Stuns the primary unit-targeted enemy for a short duration.

talents.right: +9% Persecutor Min Slow+18% Persecutor Max Slow
